episodes.episode_logline: สาวจีนในชุดเชียงเชียนแดงกลับมาที่บ้านเก่าในต่างจังหวัด เธอเห็นเงาของตัวเองในกระจก แต่เงายิ้มก่อนเธอ

scenes.title: กลับมา
scenes.location: ทางเดินหน้าบ้านไม้เก่า ต่างจังหวัด
scenes.action: [ref1] in a red cheongsam stands before an old wooden house at night, holding a lantern, looking up at the dark windows with unease.

dialogue.speaker: [ref1]
dialogue.line: ทำไมบ้านนี้... มันเงียบจนน่ากลัว

scenes.emotional_beat: ความคุ้นเคยปะทะความหวาดกลัว ความทรงจำเก่ากลับมาหลอกหลอน
scenes.camera_move: slow dolly in toward the house facade
scenes.lighting: low-key moonlight, lantern casting warm amber glow on [ref1]'s face

characters_state.name: [ref1]
characters_state.pose: standing still, lantern raised, eyes scanning windows

plot_advances: [ref1] returns to the old family home
foreshadowing: a faint silhouette will be seen in the window above in next scene
scenes.vfx_notes: subtle fog drifts across the ground, lantern flame flickers realistically
scenes.director_note: Establish isolation. The house should feel like it has been waiting. Hold on silence after the dialogue line.

scenes.title: เงาที่ยิ้มก่อน
scenes.location: ห้องนอนเก่า ชั้นสองของบ้านไม้
scenes.action: [ref1] approaches an antique mirror on the wall. Her reflection stands still, then slowly smiles before she does. The smile lingers on the reflection as [ref1]'s own face remains neutral, then frightened.

dialogue.speaker: [ref1]
dialogue.line: ...เงาฉัน... ยิ้มทำไม?

scenes.emotional_beat: หวาดกลัวสุดขีด ความจริงถูกทำลาย ตัวตนเริ่มไม่มั่นคง
scenes.camera_move: slow push in toward the mirror
scenes.lighting: low-key single candle from side, deep shadows on half of [ref1]'s face, moonlight rim light on hair
scenes.mood_color: crimson red + cold silver + deep black

characters_state.name: [ref1]
characters_state.pose: standing frozen in front of mirror, hand half-raised

plot_advances: the supernatural presence is revealed to be linked to [ref1]'s reflection
foreshadowing: the reflection's smile lingers one frame after [ref1] looks away — a clue to be paid off in Episode 2
scenes.vfx_notes: the reflection's smile begins 0.5s before [ref1]'s mouth moves; subtle desaturation on reflection layer; soft red mist pulses behind the mirror frame
scenes.transition_out: hard cut to black with low rumble, 1s
scenes.director_note: The horror is in the timing. The reflection breaks causality. Hold the smile for 2 full seconds of silence before the dialogue line lands.

timeline.prompt: [ref1] [ref1] in a red cheongsam stands before an old wooden house at night, holding a lantern, looking up
